scripts.ci:generate: pnpm --filter @packages/database db:generate && pnpm --filter @apps/admin types && pnpm --filter @apps/catalog types && pnpm --filter @apps/contact-worker types
scripts.format: prettier --ignore-path .prettierignore --write package.json prettier.config.js '.github/**/*.yml' 'scripts/**/*.mjs' 'tests/**/*.mjs' 'docs/**/*.md' 'infra/**/*.md' && pnpm -r run format
scripts.lint: prettier --ignore-path .prettierignore --check package.json prettier.config.js '.github/**/*.yml' 'scripts/**/*.mjs' 'tests/**/*.mjs' 'docs/**/*.md' 'infra/**/*.md' && pnpm ops:check && pnpm -r run lint
scripts.test: pnpm run test:ci && pnpm -r run test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run test:coverage:root && pnpm -r --if-present run test:coverage
